title: Lifecycle Dry-Run Plan Interface Closeout

issue_classifications.title: [Workspace]: Make lifecycle dry-run plans the ordinary safe interface
issue_classifications.evidence: Planning lifecycle dry-run JSON now includes a compact lifecycle_plan with target, operation, selected modules, grouped file effects, review counts, warnings, local-only boundary, and next safe command.

goal: Record #374 closeout evidence after adding a compact lifecycle dry-run plan payload.
non_goals: Do not use this generated skeleton as proof that review work is complete.

review_mode.review question: Did lifecycle dry-run output become an ordinary safe plan interface?

review_method.commands used: cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py; cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; agentic-planning-bootstrap install --dry-run --format json.

findings.title: [Workspace]: Make lifecycle dry-run plans the ordinary safe interface
findings.evidence: format_result_json adds lifecycle_plan to dry-run results; the installer test asserts schema_version, operation, selected_modules, counts, grouped files, local-only boundary, and next safe command.
findings.notes: Existing raw actions remain for compatibility, but agents can now read the compact plan first.

retention.closeout shape: shrink or archive after findings are routed
retention.proof surface: this review record plus routed follow-up residue

validation_commands: cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py
cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
